user_prompt: Can you draw a coordinate plane with trapezoid ABCD where A is at (1, 1), B is at (4, 1), C is at (3, 3), and D is at (2, 3)? Then show it translated 5 units to the right as A'B'C'D', and also show it translated 3 units up as A''B''C''D''. Label all the vertices on both images and the original.
